title: Questions asked after Brackenhill car accident
description: KNYSNA NEWS - A motor vehicle accident that...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - A motor vehicle accident that reportedly occurred along the Brackenhill stretch of the N2 on Tuesday afternoon, 27 January, has prompted questions among some locals following unverified eyewitness accounts relating to events at the scene.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - A motor vehicle accident that reportedly occurred along the Brackenhill stretch of the N2 on Tuesday afternoon, 27 January, has prompted questions among some locals following unverified eyewitness accounts relating to events at the scene."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"As reported by the Knysna-Plett Herald last week, the accident is believed to have taken place shortly after 17:00, when a vehicle allegedly veered off the road, overturned, and came to rest in bushes near the fence of a nearby residence."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Law enforcement and emergency services, including a fire engine, responded to the scene.","html":"Law enforcement and emergency services, including a fire engine, responded to the scene."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"According to onlookers, two individuals believed to be the driver and a passenger emerged from underneath the wreckage.","html":"According to onlookers, two individuals believed to be the driver and a passenger emerged from underneath the wreckage."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Witnesses allege that the pair were seen discarding bottles of alcohol from the vehicle shortly after the crash. It was further claimed that the driver may have been intoxicated and travelling at a high speed at the time of the incident.","html":"Witnesses allege that the pair were seen discarding bottles of alcohol from the vehicle shortly after the crash. It was further claimed that the driver may have been intoxicated and travelling at a high speed at the time of the incident."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Eyewitnesses reported that the two individuals left the scene in another vehicle, allegedly carrying bottles of alcohol with them. The extent of any injuries sustained in the accident remains unknown.","html":"Eyewitnesses reported that the two individuals left the scene in another vehicle, allegedly carrying bottles of alcohol with them. The extent of any injuries sustained in the accident remains unknown."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"When approached for comment, a police official informed Knysna-Plett Herald that the driver could not be located and that authorities were unaware of how the individuals had left the scene.","html":"When approached for comment, a police official informed Knysna-Plett Herald that the driver could not be located and that authorities were unaware of how the individuals had left the scene."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Further concerns were raised after additional eyewitness accounts emerged in the days following the incident."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"One eyewitness, who claims to have been the first person to arrive at the scene, alleged that a man - neither the driver nor the passenger - was seen removing unknown items from the wrecked vehicle.","html":"One eyewitness, who claims to have been the first person to arrive at the scene, alleged that a man - neither the driver nor the passenger - was seen removing unknown items from the wrecked vehicle."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"According to her account, these items were placed into plastic bags and loaded into another vehicle believed to have been used to transport the driver and passenger away from the scene."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The eyewitness stated that she imme-diately contacted Knysna Police to report the accident and provided a description of the vehicle in which the individuals allegedly fled, indicating that it was travelling in the direction of Knysna.","html":"The eyewitness stated that she imme-diately contacted Knysna Police to report the accident and provided a description of the vehicle in which the individuals allegedly fled, indicating that it was travelling in the direction of Knysna."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"She further claimed that, after no police officials arrived following her initial report, she contacted Plettenberg Bay Police to report the incident as well.","html":"She further claimed that, after no police officials arrived following her initial report, she contacted Plettenberg Bay Police to report the incident as well."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In a separate account, another commuter alleged that minutes before the crash, the vehicle believed to be involved in the accident sped past two haul trucks at an estimated speed of about 200km/h.","html":"In a separate account, another commuter alleged that minutes before the crash, the vehicle believed to be involved in the accident sped past two haul trucks at an estimated speed of about 200km/h."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"These accounts have fuelled speculation within the community that potential evidence may have been removed before authorities arrived at the scene. However, all allegations remain unverified."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"When contacted for comment, Southern Cape police spokesperson Warrant Officer Chris Spies confirmed that there is no information relating to the alleged incident available at Knysna Police.","html":"When contacted for comment, Southern Cape police spokesperson Warrant Officer Chris Spies confirmed that there is no information relating to the alleged incident available at Knysna Police."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The lack of official documentation has raised further questions among residents, with calls for transparency and a thorough investigation to establish what transpired.","html":"The lack of official documentation has raised further questions among residents, with calls for transparency and a thorough investigation to establish what transpired."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Read the previous article:","html":"Read the previous article:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Crash on N2 near Brackenhill leaves questions","html":"Crash on N2 near Brackenhill leaves questions "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram.","html":"For more Knysna-Plett Herald news, follow us on Facebook, X and Instagram."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok.","html":"You can also check out our videos on our YouTube channel or follow us on TikTok."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone.","html":"Subscribe to our WhatsApp channel and get news delivered straight to your phone."}]
